name: UK Construction Baseline
description: Baseline signage policy for UK construction-focused sites.
disclaimer: Guidance only, not legal advice. Always validate final signage plan with a qualified H&S professional.

rules.title: Hard hat mandatory areas
rules.rationale: Sites where head protection is required should post mandatory PPE signage at relevant entry points.
rules.sourceRef: UK H&S PPE guidance (workplace risk-based control)
rules.triggerDescription: Activates when hard hats are required on site.
rules.quantityDescription: One sign per main exit, minimum 1.

rules.title: High-visibility clothing mandatory
rules.rationale: Where moving vehicles or visibility risks exist, high-vis PPE signage is typically required.
rules.sourceRef: UK H&S PPE guidance (visibility risk controls)
rules.triggerDescription: Activates when high-vis PPE is required or forklifts are present.
rules.quantityDescription: One sign per main exit, minimum 1.

rules.title: Forklift traffic warning
rules.rationale: Vehicle-pedestrian interaction zones require clear warning signage.
rules.triggerDescription: Activates when forklift traffic is present.
rules.quantityDescription: One sign per main exit, minimum 2.

rules.title: Electrical hazard warning
rules.rationale: Areas with electrical hazards should be marked with warning signage.
rules.triggerDescription: Activates when electrical hazard zones are declared.

rules.title: No smoking in hazardous/storage zones
rules.rationale: Flammable material areas should enforce smoking restrictions with visible prohibition signs.
rules.sourceRef: UK fire safety and dangerous substances principles
rules.triggerDescription: Activates for flammable materials or high-risk industrial/warehouse site types.
rules.quantityDescription: One sign per main exit, minimum 2.

rules.title: Restricted access
rules.rationale: Restricted zones should be clearly identified to reduce unauthorized access.
rules.sourceRef: UK workplace safety management good practice
rules.triggerDescription: Activates when restricted areas exist on site.

rules.title: Fire exit direction
rules.rationale: Escape routes should include clear directional exit signage.
rules.triggerDescription: Always active for baseline emergency route coverage.

rules.title: Fire extinguisher location
rules.rationale: Fire-fighting equipment points should be clearly marked.
rules.sourceRef: UK fire safety signage good practice
rules.triggerDescription: Always active for baseline fire equipment marking.

rules.title: First aid point
rules.rationale: First aid locations should be clearly identifiable for workers and visitors.
rules.triggerDescription: Always active for baseline first aid visibility.
rules.quantityDescription: 2 signs when floor count is 2+, otherwise 1.

rules.title: Emergency assembly point
rules.rationale: Assembly points improve evacuation coordination and site readiness.
